text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Thanks! New Year's in Japan is awful fun!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I've had me some of those New Year's dishes...
Freshly pounded mochi, mochi soup—the works! It
was all delicious!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But that doesn't mean I'm done whoopin' it up. I
wanna do more!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Say, Trainer! Know any other fun things I could
do?
choice_data_list: You could make a New Year's resolution.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, good idea! Grass was just sayin' that too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, I know I wanna be the next Umamusume of
the Year...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What do you wanna do, Trainer? Become a
millionaire?
choice_data_list: I want to help you achieve your dream.
I want to help you achieve your dream.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You're tellin' me we can make both our
dreams come true at the same time?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What can I say—our hearts are beatin' as one!
Okay, let's work together to make it happen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our resolutions decided, next is to figure out
the steps to get there...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Well... If I had to get specific...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but thinkin' ain't my strong suit! You're
gonna have to take this one, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't expecting to be thrown in the deep end.
If we're going to make Taiki Shuttle the next
Umamusume of the Year...
choice_data_list: Let's work on increasing your speed.

Let's make sure you rest when you're supposed
to.
Let's work on increasing your arsenal.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Increasin' my speed? Oh, I know a thing or two
about that! Call it my specialty!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness... I dunno what I would've done if
you'd said studying.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
N-not that I'm bad at studyin' or nothin', mind
you! Honest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vaguely worried about just how poor she must be
at studying, I talk her through my ideas for
brushing up her speed.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer, just how much do ya know?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I was plannin' on rounding up all my friends for
some non-stop partyin' this New Year's break...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But all right... I'll get some rest. That's what I
gotta do to become Umamusume of the Year.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
...But do ya think I could throw one teensy little
party? Just for a single day?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not wanting anything to impact our training, I
warn her to keep her partying within reason.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Arsenal? Ya mean weapons?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So it's a quick draw ya want! Bang, bang!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I can also throw a mean lasso! Not to mention...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I clarify that I'm not talking about actual
weapons, but rather the importance of improving
her skills.
